example_zh: 在海外生活三年後，她的法語和西班牙語都變得十分流利。

example: Doctors advised him to drink plenty of fluid to recover faster.
example_zh: 醫生建議他多補充液體，以便更快康復。

example: He stayed up all night studying, terrified he might flunk the exam.
example_zh: 他熬夜苦讀，非常擔心自己會在考試中不及格。

example: Her cheeks began to flush with embarrassment when everyone applauded her unexpectedly.
example_zh: 當所有人突然為她鼓掌時，她的雙頰開始因羞赧而泛紅。

example: The delicate melody from her flute echoed softly through the quiet concert hall.
example_zh: 她的長笛所奏出的柔美旋律，在寧靜的音樂廳中輕輕迴盪。

example: The barista carefully poured steamed foam on top of the cappuccino.
example_zh: 咖啡師細心地在卡布奇諾上方倒入蒸製的泡沫。

example: Local folk gathered at the square to celebrate the annual harvest festival.
example_zh: 當地的人們聚集在廣場上，慶祝一年一度的豐收節。

example: The school regulations strictly forbid students from using smartphones during class hours.
example_zh: 學校規定嚴格禁止學生在上課時間使用智慧型手機。

example: The fierce storm's force was strong enough to uproot several old trees.
example_zh: 猛烈風暴的力量強大到足以將幾棵老樹連根拔起。

example: The weather forecast predicted heavy rainfall throughout the entire upcoming weekend.
example_zh: 天氣預報預測整個即將到來的週末將會持續豪雨。

example: She gently pressed a cool towel against his burning forehead to soothe the fever.
example_zh: 她輕輕將一條涼毛巾敷在他發燙的額頭上，以舒緩發燒不適。

example: It took her years to truly forgive her friend for the painful betrayal.
example_zh: 她花了好幾年的時間，才真正原諒了朋友對她造成的痛苦背叛。

example: Please submit your assignment in the required format before the deadline tomorrow.
example_zh: 請在明天截止日期之前，以規定的格式提交你的作業。

example: The geologist studied the unusual rock formation near the ancient riverbed.
example_zh: 地質學家在古老的河床附近研究了那片不尋常的岩層。

example: Scientists spent decades refining the formula to produce a reliable vaccine.
example_zh: 科學家花了數十年改良配方，以研發出可靠的疫苗。

example: The abandoned fort on the hilltop attracted curious tourists every summer.
example_zh: 山頂上廢棄的堡壘每年夏天都吸引著好奇的遊客前來參觀。

example: The entrepreneur set forth on a journey to establish her own business.
example_zh: 這位創業家踏上旅程，向前邁進，準備創辦自己的事業。

example: We were fortunate to secure the last available tickets before they sold out.
example_zh: 我們很幸運，在票售罄之前搶到了最後幾張入場券。

example: He spent his entire fortune on renovating the historic mansion downtown.
example_zh: 他將全部財富都花在翻新市區那棟歷史古宅上。

example: The online forum provided a space for professionals to exchange valuable insights.
example_zh: 這個線上論壇為專業人士提供了一個交流寶貴見解的空間。

example: The museum displayed a remarkably preserved fossil of a prehistoric marine creature.
example_zh: 博物館展示了一塊保存極為完好的史前海洋生物化石。

example: A solid foundation in mathematics is essential for pursuing an engineering degree.
example_zh: 扎實的數學基礎對於攻讀工程學位至關重要。

example: The founder of the nonprofit organization dedicated her life to helping refugees.
example_zh: 這個非營利組織的創辦人畢生致力於幫助難民。

example: Children gathered around the ornate fountain in the center of the plaza.
example_zh: 孩子們聚集在廣場中央那座華麗的噴泉旁嬉戲。

example: The fragrant blossoms of jasmine filled the entire garden with a sweet scent.
example_zh: 茉莉花芳香的花朵使整座花園瀰漫著甜蜜的氣息。

example: The artist chose a gilded frame to complement her intricate oil painting.
example_zh: 這位藝術家選了一個鍍金畫框來襯托她精緻的油畫作品。

example: The activists campaigned tirelessly to secure freedom of speech for all citizens.
example_zh: 社會運動人士不懈地奔走，為所有公民爭取言論自由。

example: Heavy traffic on the freeway caused significant delays for commuters heading downtown.
example_zh: 高速公路上嚴重的車流為前往市區的通勤者造成大幅延誤。

example: She stored several portions of homemade soup in the freezer for later.
example_zh: 她把幾份自製湯品存放在冷凍庫裡，留待日後食用。

example: The frequency of her migraines increased significantly during periods of stress.
example_zh: 她偏頭痛發作的頻率在壓力較大的時期明顯增加。

example: His frequent absences from work raised concerns among his colleagues.
example_zh: 他頻繁地缺勤讓同事們感到憂心。

example: The sudden sound of thunder managed to frighten even the bravest campers.
example_zh: 突如其來的雷聲甚至使最勇敢的露營者也感到害怕。

example: A thin layer of frost covered the grass on the cold winter morning.
example_zh: 一層薄薄的霜覆蓋在寒冷冬晨的草地上。

example: She began to frown when she noticed several errors in the report.
example_zh: 當她發現報告中有幾處錯誤時，她開始皺起眉頭。

example: The repeated technical failures continued to frustrate the entire engineering team.
example_zh: 反覆出現的技術故障持續使整個工程團隊感到挫折。

example: The expedition team carried enough fuel to last through the harsh winter months.
example_zh: 探險隊攜帶了足夠的燃料以度過嚴酷的冬季數月。

example: She worked tirelessly for years to fulfill her dream of becoming a doctor.
example_zh: 她多年來孜孜不倦地努力，以實現成為醫生的夢想。

example: The main function of the new application is to simplify budget management tasks.
example_zh: 這款新應用程式的主要功能是簡化預算管理工作。

example: Mutual respect is fundamental to maintaining any healthy and lasting relationship.
example_zh: 相互尊重是維繫任何健康且持久關係的基礎。

example: The entire community gathered to attend the funeral of the beloved village elder.
example_zh: 整個社區聚集在一起，參加這位備受愛戴的村中長老的喪禮。

example: Many fashion designers now avoid using real fur due to ethical concerns.
example_zh: 許多時裝設計師現在因道德顧慮而避免使用真正的毛皮。

example: The proposal was costly; furthermore, it lacked sufficient evidence to support the claims.
example_zh: 這項提案費用高昂；再者，它缺乏足夠的證據來支持那些論點。

example: The truck consumed nearly a gallon of fuel for every fifteen miles driven.
example_zh: 這輛卡車每行駛十五英里幾乎消耗一加侖的燃料。

example: He decided to gamble his savings on a risky investment scheme.
example_zh: 他決定將積蓄押注在一項風險極高的投資計畫上。

example: The local gang intimidated residents by vandalizing shops on the street.
example_zh: 當地幫派藉由破壞街上的店鋪來恐嚇居民。

example: There is a significant gap between wealthy families and those in poverty.
example_zh: 富裕家庭與貧困家庭之間存在著顯著的差距。

example: She crushed several cloves of garlic to enhance the flavor of her dish.
example_zh: 她搗碎了幾瓣大蒜，以增添菜餚的風味。

example: The mechanic warned that the car would consume excessive gasoline on long journeys.
example_zh: 技師警告說，這輛車在長途旅行中會消耗過多的汽油。

example: She would often gaze at the stars, wondering about the universe's mysteries.
example_zh: 她經常凝視著星空，思索著宇宙的奧祕。

example: The hikers checked their gear carefully before setting off on the trail.
example_zh: 健行者在出發前仔細檢查了他們的裝備。

example: Scientists discovered a specific gene that appears to influence a person's intelligence.
example_zh: 科學家發現了一種特定的基因，似乎會影響人的智力。

example: The new solar panels can generate enough electricity to power the entire building.
example_zh: 這些新型太陽能板可以產生足夠的電力來供應整棟建築。

example: Each generation faces unique challenges that previous ones could not have anticipated.
example_zh: 每個世代都面臨著前一世代無法預料的獨特挑戰。

example: A single germ can multiply rapidly and trigger a serious infection if untreated.
example_zh: 一個細菌若未加以處理，可以迅速繁殖並引發嚴重感染。

example: The children began to giggle uncontrollably when the clown made a silly face.
example_zh: 當小丑做出滑稽表情時，孩子們開始忍不住咯咯大笑。

example: Adding fresh ginger to the soup gives it a warm and slightly spicy flavor.
example_zh: 在湯裡加入新鮮的薑，能賦予它溫暖且略帶辛辣的風味。

example: He took a quick glance at his notes before walking into the interview room.
example_zh: 他在走進面試室之前，快速瞥了一眼自己的筆記。

example: The teacher began to glare at the student who kept interrupting the lesson.
example_zh: 老師開始怒視那個一直打斷課程的學生。

example: Climate change is a global issue that demands immediate international cooperation.
example_zh: 氣候變遷是一個需要立即展開國際合作的全球性議題。

example: The athlete basked in the glory of her record-breaking Olympic performance.
example_zh: 那位運動員沉浸在她打破奧運紀錄的光榮之中。

example: The embers continued to glow softly in the fireplace long after midnight.
example_zh: 壁爐裡的餘燼在午夜過後仍輕輕地發著光。

example: The imported goods were inspected carefully at the border before being released.
example_zh: 進口商品在邊境經過仔細檢查後才獲准放行。

example: Spreading gossip about colleagues can seriously damage trust within a workplace.
example_zh: 在同事之間散播閒話會嚴重破壞職場中的信任感。

example: The governor announced a new initiative to improve public transportation in the state.
example_zh: 州長宣布了一項改善該州公共交通的新計畫。

example: She wore an elegant silk gown to the formal ceremony last evening.
example_zh: 她昨晚穿著一件優雅的絲質長袍出席正式典禮。

example: He managed to grab the railing just before losing his balance on the stairs.
example_zh: 他在樓梯上快要失去平衡時，及時抓住了扶手。

example: The graceful dancer captivated the audience with her fluid and precise movements.
example_zh: 那位優雅的舞者以流暢而精準的動作吸引了全場觀眾。

example: The patient made a gradual recovery after undergoing the complex surgical procedure.
example_zh: 那位病患在接受複雜的外科手術後逐漸康復。

example: She plans to graduate from medical school and specialize in pediatrics next year.
example_zh: 她計畫明年從醫學院畢業，並專攻兒科。

example: His graduation ceremony was attended by proud family members from across the country.
example_zh: 他的畢業典禮上，來自全國各地的驕傲家人紛紛出席。

example: Farmers in the region rely heavily on grain exports to sustain their livelihoods.
example_zh: 該地區的農民非常依賴穀物出口來維持生計。

example: Mastering English grammar requires consistent practice and exposure to authentic reading materials.
example_zh: 精通英文文法需要持續的練習以及接觸真實的閱讀材料。

example: The grand cathedral in the city center attracts thousands of tourists every year.
example_zh: 市中心那座宏偉的大教堂每年吸引數千名遊客前來參觀。

example: My grandparent shared fascinating stories about life during the war era.
example_zh: 我的祖父母分享了許多關於戰時生活的精彩故事。

example: The foundation decided to grant scholarships to outstanding students this year.
example_zh: 基金會決定今年向優秀學生授予獎學金。

example: She struggled to grasp the complex mathematical concept during the lecture.
example_zh: 她在課堂上努力理解這個複雜的數學概念。

example: The grasshopper leaped swiftly across the meadow on a warm afternoon.
example_zh: 蚱蜢在溫暖的午後迅速地跳過草地。

example: He felt deeply grateful for the unexpected support from his colleagues.
example_zh: 他對同事們意外的支持感到深深的感激。

example: She expressed her sincere gratitude by writing a heartfelt thank-you letter.
example_zh: 她寫了一封真誠的感謝信來表達她的感激之情。

example: Gravity pulls all objects toward Earth regardless of their size or weight.
example_zh: 無論物體的大小或重量如何，地心引力都將其拉向地球。

example: The mechanic's hands were greasy after repairing the engine all morning.
example_zh: 機械師在整個上午修理引擎後，雙手沾滿了油污。

example: The greedy merchant refused to share his wealth with struggling neighbors.
example_zh: 貪婪的商人拒絕與生活困苦的鄰居分享他的財富。

example: She stopped at the grocery store to pick up fresh vegetables and bread.
example_zh: 她在雜貨店停下來購買新鮮蔬菜和麵包。

example: Consistent practice is essential for steady growth in any musical skill.
example_zh: 持續練習對於在任何音樂技能上穩定成長是不可或缺的。

example: The company cannot guarantee delivery within three days during peak season.
example_zh: 在旺季期間，公司無法保證三天內送達。

example: Students benefit greatly from professional guidance when choosing their university major.
example_zh: 在選擇大學主修科目時，學生能從專業指導中獲益良多。

example: The defendant was found guilty of fraud after a lengthy court trial.
example_zh: 被告在漫長的法庭審判後被裁定詐欺罪成立。

example: A vast gulf of misunderstanding existed between the two negotiating parties.
example_zh: 兩個談判方之間存在著巨大的誤解鴻溝。

example: The dentist advised her to floss daily to protect her gums.
example_zh: 牙醫建議她每天使用牙線以保護牙齦。

example: She visits the gym three times a week to maintain her fitness.
example_zh: 她每週去健身房三次以維持體能。

example: The school's gymnasium was renovated to accommodate more students during sports events.
example_zh: 學校的體育館經過翻新，以在體育賽事期間容納更多學生。

example: The hairdresser recommended a shorter style to complement her facial features.
example_zh: 美髮師建議她剪短髮以襯托臉部輪廓。

example: The children's artwork was displayed along the hallway outside the classroom.
example_zh: 孩子們的畫作展示在教室外的走廊上。

example: The construction project was forced to halt due to unexpected budget cuts.
example_zh: 建設計畫因意外的預算削減而被迫停止。

example: She sprinkled a handful of nuts over the salad for extra crunch.
example_zh: 她在沙拉上撒了一把堅果，增添酥脆口感。

example: His visual handicap did not prevent him from pursuing a career in music.
example_zh: 他的視覺障礙並未阻止他追求音樂事業。

example: The teacher noticed that the student's handwriting had improved significantly over the semester.
example_zh: 老師注意到這位學生的筆跡在這學期有顯著進步。

example: A portable charger is particularly handy when traveling long distances without power outlets.
example_zh: 行動電源在長途旅行且無插座可用時特別方便。

example: The fishing boats returned to the harbor before the storm reached the coast.
example_zh: 漁船在風暴抵達海岸前返回了港口。

example: Excessive screen time can harm children's eyesight if left unchecked.
example_zh: 過度使用螢幕若不加以控制，可能傷害兒童視力。

example: Researchers confirmed that prolonged exposure to UV rays is harmful to skin cells.
example_zh: 研究人員證實長期暴露於紫外線對皮膚細胞有害。

example: The two neighboring countries maintained harmony through open dialogue and mutual respect.
example_zh: 兩個鄰國透過開放對話與相互尊重維持和諧關係。

example: The coach's harsh criticism discouraged several talented players from continuing with the team.
example_zh: 教練嚴厲的批評使幾位有才華的球員打消了繼續留隊的念頭。

example: Farmers celebrated a bountiful harvest after months of dedicated labor.
example_zh: 農民在數月辛勤耕耘後，歡慶豐收的到來。

example: Her hasty decision to resign left the entire team in disarray.
example_zh: 她倉促辭職的決定讓整個團隊陷入混亂。

example: The eaglets began to hatch just as spring arrived in the valley.
example_zh: 就在春天降臨山谷之際，幼鷹們開始破殼而出。

example: Deep-seated hatred between rival factions prolonged the conflict for many decades.
example_zh: 對立派系之間根深蒂固的憎恨使衝突延續了數十年。

example: A hawk circled silently overhead, scanning the meadow for its prey.
example_zh: 一隻鷹在頭頂默默盤旋，俯視草原尋找獵物。

example: The farmer stacked bundles of hay neatly inside the old wooden barn.
example_zh: 農夫將一捆捆乾草整齊地堆放在古老的木製穀倉裡。

example: Poor road lighting poses a serious hazard for cyclists after dark.
example_zh: 路燈不足對入夜後騎車的人構成嚴重危險。

example: The shocking headline about the scandal dominated every major newspaper that morning.
example_zh: 那則關於醜聞的驚人標題佔據了當天早上各大報紙的版面。

example: She wore noise-cancelling headphones to concentrate during the lengthy international flight.
example_zh: 她戴上降噪耳機，以便在漫長的國際航班中專心工作。

example: The company relocated its headquarters to the capital to attract top talent.
example_zh: 該公司將總部遷至首都，以吸引頂尖人才。

example: It took several months for her fractured wrist to fully heal.
example_zh: 她骨折的手腕花了好幾個月才完全痊癒。

example: After the grueling hike, reaching the summit felt like pure heaven.
example_zh: 在艱辛的健行之後，抵達山頂的感覺宛如置身天堂。

example: The neatly trimmed hedge along the driveway gave the property an elegant look.
example_zh: 車道旁修剪整齊的樹籬使這處房產看起來格外典雅。

example: She twisted her heel awkwardly while descending the steep flight of stairs.
example_zh: 她在走下陡峭的樓梯時，不小心扭傷了腳跟。

example: Architects must consider the maximum allowable height before designing a new skyscraper.
example_zh: 建築師在設計新摩天大樓之前，必須考量最大允許高度。

example: Many ancient myths describe hell as a dark realm beneath the earth.
example_zh: 許多古老的神話將地獄描述為地底下一片黑暗的領域。

example: Cyclists are strongly advised to wear a helmet before riding on busy roads.
example_zh: 強烈建議騎自行車者在繁忙道路上騎車前務必戴上頭盔。

example: She did not hesitate to speak up when she witnessed the unfair treatment.
example_zh: 當她目睹不公平的對待時，她毫不猶豫地站出來發聲。

example: The professor used specific examples to highlight the importance of critical thinking skills.
example_zh: 教授用具體的例子來強調批判性思維技能的重要性。

example: He gave her a subtle hint that the surprise party was already planned.
example_zh: 他給了她一個微妙的暗示，告訴她驚喜派對已經安排好了。

example: The dancer moved her hip gracefully to the rhythm of the Latin music.
example_zh: 舞者隨著拉丁音樂的節奏優雅地擺動著臀部。

example: The massive hippo emerged from the river and frightened the nearby tourists badly.
example_zh: 那隻巨大的河馬從河中現身，把附近的遊客嚇得不輕。

example: Visiting historical sites across Europe gave the students a deeper appreciation of culture.
example_zh: 遊覽歐洲各地的歷史遺址讓學生們對文化有了更深刻的體會。

example: The squirrel stored its winter food inside a hollow tree near the park.
example_zh: 松鼠把過冬的食物儲存在公園附近一棵空心樹裡。

example: Thousands of pilgrims travel to the holy city every year to seek blessings.
example_zh: 每年有數千名朝聖者前往這座神聖的城市尋求祝福。

example: After years abroad, she finally returned to her homeland with a grateful heart.
example_zh: 在海外多年後，她終於懷著感恩的心回到了自己的祖國。

example: His honesty in admitting the mistake earned him great respect from his colleagues.
example_zh: 他誠實承認錯誤的態度贏得了同事們對他的高度尊重。

example: Receiving the award was a great honor that she had worked hard for.
example_zh: 獲得這個獎項是她辛苦努力所換來的莫大榮譽。

example: She pulled the hood of her jacket over her head to block the rain.
example_zh: 她把夾克的頭巾拉過頭頂，以遮擋傾盆而下的雨水。

example: The fisherman attached fresh bait to the hook before casting his line again.
example_zh: 漁夫在再次拋線之前，在鉤上掛上了新鮮的魚餌。

example: Despite recent setbacks, the young athlete remained hopeful about her future career.
example_zh: 儘管近來遭遇挫折，這位年輕運動員仍對未來的職業生涯抱持希望。

example: The sailors watched the golden sun slowly sink below the distant horizon.
example_zh: 水手們凝視著金色的太陽緩緩沉落至遙遠的地平線之下。

example: The impatient driver honked his horn repeatedly in the heavy traffic.
example_zh: 那位不耐煩的駕駛在嚴重的塞車中不斷按喇叭。

example: The audience screamed in horror when the monster suddenly appeared on screen.
example_zh: 當怪物突然出現在螢幕上時，觀眾們驚恐地尖叫起來。

example: Every household in the neighborhood participated in the recycling program enthusiastically.
example_zh: 社區裡的每個家戶都熱情地參與了資源回收計畫。

example: The resourceful housewife managed the family budget carefully while raising three children.
example_zh: 那位能幹的家庭主婦在撫養三個孩子的同時，仔細地管理家庭預算。

example: The government announced a new policy to address the shortage of affordable housing.
example_zh: 政府宣布了一項新政策，以解決平價住宅短缺的問題。

example: She rushed across the room to hug her grandmother after months apart.
example_zh: 分別數月後，她衝過房間緊緊擁抱她的祖母。

example: The construction crew discovered a huge underground cave beneath the city street.
example_zh: 施工隊在城市街道下方發現了一個巨大的地下洞穴。

example: The documentary explored both the cruelty and compassion that define our humanity.
example_zh: 這部紀錄片探討了定義我們人性的殘酷與慈悲兩面。

example: The tropical rainforest was so humid that our clothes were soaked within minutes.
example_zh: 熱帶雨林非常潮濕，我們的衣服在幾分鐘內就濕透了。

example: The humorous speech delivered by the principal made the entire graduation audience laugh.
example_zh: 校長發表的幽默演講讓畢業典禮上的全體觀眾都笑了起來。

example: Hush, the baby has finally fallen asleep after crying for two hours.
example_zh: 安靜，寶寶在哭了兩個小時後終於睡著了。

example: The exhausted hikers found shelter from the storm in a small wooden hut.
example_zh: 精疲力竭的健行者在一間小木屋裡躲避了暴風雨。

example: Drivers were warned to slow down on the icy mountain roads after the storm.
example_zh: 暴風雪過後，駕駛人被警告要在結冰的山路上放慢速度。

example: The twin sisters wore identical outfits to their graduation ceremony yesterday.
example_zh: 這對雙胞胎姐妹昨天穿著完全相同的服裝參加畢業典禮。

example: Please bring valid identification before entering the restricted research facility.
example_zh: 進入限制性研究設施之前，請攜帶有效的身分證明文件。

example: Scientists used advanced technology to identify the rare species of butterfly.
example_zh: 科學家使用先進技術鑑定出這種罕見的蝴蝶品種。

example: Protecting your personal identity online has become increasingly crucial nowadays.
example_zh: 在網路上保護個人身分已變得越來越重要。

example: The expression 'break a leg' is a popular idiom used in theater.
example_zh: 「break a leg」這個表達是劇院中常用的慣用語。

example: The idle machinery in the factory represented a significant financial loss.
example_zh: 工廠中閒置的機器代表著相當大的財務損失。

example: Millions of teenagers admired the pop idol for his remarkable musical talent.
example_zh: 數百萬青少年欽佩這位流行偶像非凡的音樂才能。

example: Dumping toxic waste into rivers is highly illegal and environmentally destructive.
example_zh: 將有毒廢棄物傾倒入河流是非法且對環境有害的行為。

example: The professor used vivid diagrams to illustrate the complex biological process clearly.
example_zh: 教授使用生動的圖表清楚地舉例說明複雜的生物過程。

example: The company worked hard to rebuild its damaged image after the scandal.
example_zh: 該公司努力在醜聞之後重建其受損的形象。

example: Her vivid imagination allowed her to craft compelling stories that captivated readers.
example_zh: 她豐富的想像力使她能夠創作出引人入勝、令讀者著迷的故事。

example: Young children naturally imitate the behaviors and speech patterns of their parents.
example_zh: 幼小的孩子自然而然地模仿父母的行為和說話方式。

example: The government took immediate action to address the severe flooding in the region.
example_zh: 政府立即採取行動，因應該地區嚴重的洪災問題。

example: The hardworking immigrant eventually built a successful bakery in her adopted country.
example_zh: 這位勤奮的移民最終在她的新居住國建立了一家成功的麵包店。

example: Social media has had a profound impact on how people communicate daily.
example_zh: 社群媒體對人們日常溝通方式產生了深遠的影響。

example: The country relies heavily on importing crude oil to sustain its economy.
example_zh: 該國嚴重依賴進口原油來維持其經濟運作。

example: Her dedication and fluency in three languages truly impressed the hiring committee.
example_zh: 她的敬業精神和三語流利程度確實令招聘委員會印象深刻。

example: The candidate's well-prepared speech left a lasting impression on the audience.
example_zh: 這位候選人準備充分的演講給觀眾留下了深刻的印象。

example: The architect's portfolio showcased an impressive range of innovative and sustainable designs.
example_zh: 這位建築師的作品集展示了一系列令人印象深刻的創新永續設計。

example: Consistent practice led to a remarkable improvement in her public speaking skills.
example_zh: 持續的練習使她的公開演講技巧有了顯著的改善。

example: The security incident at the embassy prompted officials to review safety protocols.
example_zh: 大使館發生的安全事件促使官員重新審視安全規程。

example: The revised curriculum will include modules on digital literacy and critical thinking.
example_zh: 修訂後的課程將包含數位素養與批判性思考的單元。

example: Many freelancers struggle to maintain a stable income during economic downturns.
example_zh: 許多自由工作者在經濟衰退期間努力維持穩定的收入。

example: The government plans to increase funding for renewable energy research next year.
example_zh: 政府計劃明年增加對再生能源研究的資金投入。

example: Gaining financial independence requires disciplined saving and thoughtful long-term planning.
example_zh: 獲得財務獨立需要有紀律的儲蓄和深思熟慮的長期規劃。

example: She chose to remain independent and launched her own consulting firm.
example_zh: 她選擇保持獨立，並創辦了自己的顧問公司。

example: Researchers used a well-established index to measure the country's quality of life.
example_zh: 研究人員使用一個公認的指數來衡量該國的生活品質。

example: Recent surveys indicate that consumer confidence has risen significantly over the past quarter.
example_zh: 最近的調查指出，消費者信心在過去一季已顯著提升。

example: Each individual participant was given a tailored feedback report after the workshop.
example_zh: 每位個別參與者在工作坊結束後都收到了量身定制的回饋報告。

example: The newly built indoor sports complex can accommodate up to five thousand spectators.
example_zh: 這座新建的室內運動綜合設施最多可容納五千名觀眾。

example: The industrial district was transformed into a vibrant cultural and artistic hub.
example_zh: 這個工業區被改造成了一個充滿活力的文化藝術中心。

example: The tourism industry has recovered remarkably fast after years of severe disruption.
example_zh: 旅遊業在多年嚴重衰退後，以驚人的速度復甦。

example: The virus can rapidly infect vulnerable individuals who lack adequate immune protection.
example_zh: 病毒能迅速感染那些缺乏足夠免疫保護的脆弱人群。

example: Some critics argue that the sequel is clearly inferior to the original film.
example_zh: 部分評論家認為，這部續集明顯遜色於原版電影。

example: Scientists believe the universe offers an almost infinite variety of unexplored phenomena.
example_zh: 科學家認為，宇宙提供了幾乎無限多種尚待探索的現象。

example: The authorities failed to inform residents about the potential risks of flooding.
example_zh: 當局未能及時通知居民有關洪水的潛在危險。

example: The manager preferred having informal discussions rather than scheduling lengthy formal meetings.
example_zh: 這位經理偏好進行非正式討論，而非安排冗長的正式會議。

example: Fresh herbs are considered the key ingredient in making authentic Mediterranean cuisine.
example_zh: 新鮮香草被視為製作正宗地中海料理的關鍵成分。

example: Her initial reaction to the unexpected job offer was a mixture of shock and delight.
example_zh: 她對這份意外工作邀約的最初反應是震驚與喜悅交織。

example: The athlete had to withdraw after slipping on the court and seriously injuring his knee.
example_zh: 那名運動員在球場上滑倒後嚴重傷及膝蓋，不得不退賽。

example: The cyclist suffered a serious injury and required surgery after the collision.
example_zh: 這名自行車手在碰撞事故後受了重傷，需要接受手術治療。

example: Meditation is often recommended as a way to cultivate inner peace and mental clarity.
example_zh: 冥想常被推薦為培養內心平靜與思緒清晰的有效方式。

example: The jury declared the defendant innocent after reviewing all the available evidence thoroughly.
example_zh: 陪審團在仔細審查所有現有證據後，宣判被告無罪。

example: The project manager valued every team member's input before finalizing the strategic plan.
example_zh: 專案經理在確定策略計畫之前，重視每位團隊成員的意見。

example: The building inspector arrived early to carefully inspect the newly constructed apartment complex.
example_zh: 建築檢查員提早抵達，仔細檢查這棟新建的公寓大樓。

example: The athlete's remarkable comeback inspired countless young people to pursue their dreams.
example_zh: 那位運動員非凡的復出激勵了無數年輕人去追求自己的夢想。

example: The technician installed the updated software on all the office computers efficiently.
example_zh: 技術人員有效率地在所有辦公室電腦上安裝了更新的軟體。

example: In this instance, the committee decided to postpone the vote until next week.
example_zh: 在這個例子中，委員會決定將投票延至下週。

example: The research institute published groundbreaking findings on climate change and ocean temperatures.
example_zh: 該研究機構發表了有關氣候變遷與海洋溫度的突破性研究成果。

example: The prestigious institution has trained some of the country's most distinguished scientists.
example_zh: 這所享有盛譽的機構培育了國內許多傑出的科學家。

example: The supervisor instructed her team to submit all reports before Friday afternoon.
example_zh: 主管指示她的團隊在週五下午之前提交所有報告。

example: Please read the instruction manual carefully before attempting to assemble the furniture.
example_zh: 請在嘗試組裝家具之前仔細閱讀說明書。

example: The yoga instructor demonstrated each pose slowly so that beginners could follow.
example_zh: 瑜伽教練緩慢地示範每個姿勢，讓初學者能夠跟上。

example: It is never acceptable to insult someone based on their cultural background.
example_zh: 以文化背景侮辱他人是絕對不可接受的行為。

example: Purchasing travel insurance is highly advisable when planning trips to remote destinations.
example_zh: 前往偏遠地區旅行時，購買旅遊保險是非常明智的選擇。

example: She intends to apply for a scholarship to study abroad next year.
example_zh: 她打算申請獎學金，明年出國留學。

example: The debate grew so intense that several participants had to take a break.
example_zh: 辯論變得如此激烈，以至於幾位參與者不得不暫時休息。

example: His intention was to resolve the conflict peacefully without causing further misunderstanding.
example_zh: 他的意圖是和平解決衝突，避免造成進一步的誤解。

example: Children who interact with peers from diverse backgrounds develop stronger social skills.
example_zh: 與來自不同背景的同儕互動的孩子，能培養出更強的社交能力。

example: Parents should avoid interfering too much in their teenagers' personal decision-making processes.
example_zh: 父母應避免過度干涉青少年的個人決策過程。

example: She enrolled in an intermediate course to sharpen her photography skills.
example_zh: 她報名了一門中級課程，以精進她的攝影技巧。

example: The diplomat struggled to interpret the foreign minister's ambiguous remarks accurately.
example_zh: 這位外交官努力準確地解釋外交部長含糊的言論。

example: It is considered rude to interrupt someone during a formal presentation.
example_zh: 在正式簡報中打斷別人說話被認為是不禮貌的行為。

example: They shared an intimate conversation over coffee that strengthened their bond.
example_zh: 他們在喝咖啡時進行了一段親密的交談，加深了彼此的情誼。

example: Authorities decided to investigate the suspicious transactions discovered in the accounts.
example_zh: 當局決定調查在帳戶中發現的可疑交易。

example: Purchasing quality equipment proved to be a wise investment for the studio.
example_zh: 購買優質設備被證明是這間工作室明智的投資。

example: She received an unexpected invitation to speak at the international conference.
example_zh: 她收到了一封出乎意料的邀請，受邀在國際研討會上發言。

example: The renovation project will involve demolishing the old walls and rebuilding them.
example_zh: 這項翻修計畫將涉及拆除舊牆並重新建造。

example: Researchers need to isolate the virus sample before conducting further laboratory tests.
example_zh: 研究人員在進行進一步實驗室測試之前，需要隔離病毒樣本。

example: Climate change remains a critical issue that demands immediate global attention.
example_zh: 氣候變遷仍是一個需要全球立即關注的重大議題。

example: My skin began to itch severely after I touched the unfamiliar plant.
example_zh: 我觸摸那株陌生的植物後，皮膚開始嚴重發癢。

example: The antique piano keys were crafted from genuine ivory, now strictly banned.
example_zh: 這架古董鋼琴的琴鍵是用真正的象牙製成的，現已被嚴格禁止。

example: The convicted fraudster was sentenced to three years in jail without parole.
example_zh: 這名被定罪的詐騙犯被判處三年監禁，不得假釋。

example: She kept her homemade raspberry jam in a sealed glass jar.
example_zh: 她將自製的覆盆子果醬保存在一個密封的玻璃罐子裡。

example: The dentist carefully examined her jaw to diagnose the source of pain.
example_zh: 牙醫仔細檢查她的下顎，以診斷疼痛的來源。

example: She felt jealous when her colleague received the promotion she had worked toward.
example_zh: 當她的同事獲得她努力爭取的晉升機會時，她感到嫉妒。

example: The children spread strawberry jelly generously on their toast every morning.
example_zh: 孩子們每天早上都把草莓果凍慷慨地塗在吐司上。

example: The private jet landed smoothly despite the turbulent weather conditions outside.
example_zh: 儘管外面天氣惡劣，那架私人噴射機仍平穩降落。

example: The antique jewel in the museum collection was estimated at over a million dollars.
example_zh: 博物館收藏的那件古董珠寶估價超過一百萬美元。

example: She carefully selected a pearl necklace from the elegant jewelry boutique downtown.
example_zh: 她從市中心優雅的珠寶精品店仔細挑選了一條珍珠項鍊。

example: The researcher submitted her findings to a prestigious academic journal for peer review.
example_zh: 這位研究員將她的研究成果提交給一本著名的學術期刊進行同儕審查。

example: The investigative journalist uncovered a corruption scandal that shocked the entire nation.
example_zh: 這位調查記者揭露了一樁震驚全國的腐敗醜聞。

example: Their journey across the vast desert revealed breathtaking landscapes they had never imagined.
example_zh: 他們穿越廣闊沙漠的旅程呈現了他們從未想像過的壯麗景色。

example: The experienced judge evaluated each contestant's performance based on creativity and technique.
example_zh: 這位經驗豐富的法官根據創意和技巧評估每位參賽者的表現。

example: His poor judgment led the company to make a disastrous financial investment.
example_zh: 他糟糕的判斷使公司做出了一項災難性的財務投資。

example: Exploring the dense jungle, they encountered rare species found nowhere else on earth.
example_zh: 在探索茂密的叢林時，他們發現了地球其他地方絕無僅有的珍稀物種。

example: The attorney fought tirelessly to ensure that justice was served for the victims.
example_zh: 這位律師不懈奮鬥，確保受害者能夠得到正義。

example: The kangaroo bounded effortlessly across the vast Australian outback at remarkable speed.
example_zh: 這隻袋鼠以驚人的速度輕鬆地跳躍穿越廣闊的澳洲內陸。

example: The dedicated keeper monitored the animals' health and well-being around the clock.
example_zh: 這位盡職的守護者全天候監控動物們的健康與福祉。

example: He generously drizzled ketchup over his fries before sitting down to eat.
example_zh: 他在坐下來吃飯之前，慷慨地把番茄醬淋在薯條上。

example: She filled the kettle with water and placed it on the stove to boil.
example_zh: 她把水壺裝滿水，放在爐子上燒開。

example: His wireless keyboard allows him to type comfortably from across the room.
example_zh: 他的無線鍵盤讓他可以舒適地在房間另一端打字。

example: The doctor advised him to drink more water to protect his kidneys.
example_zh: 醫生建議他多喝水以保護腎臟。

example: My grandmother knits warm scarves for the entire family every winter.
example_zh: 我的祖母每年冬天為全家人編織溫暖的圍巾。

example: The sailor tied a firm knot to secure the boat to the dock.
example_zh: 水手打了一個牢固的結，將船固定在碼頭上。

example: Always read the ingredient label carefully before purchasing any packaged food.
example_zh: 購買任何包裝食品前，務必仔細閱讀成分標籤。

example: The construction project required intensive labor from dozens of skilled workers.
example_zh: 這項建設工程需要數十名熟練工人付出大量勞動。

example: Scientists conducted numerous experiments in the laboratory to test their hypothesis.
example_zh: 科學家在實驗室中進行了大量實驗來驗證他們的假設。

example: He climbed the ladder carefully to replace the broken light bulb.
example_zh: 他小心地爬上梯子，更換壞掉的燈泡。

example: The landlord agreed to repair the leaking roof before the rainy season.
example_zh: 房東同意在雨季來臨前修繕漏水的屋頂。

example: The breathtaking landscape of the valley attracted thousands of tourists each year.
example_zh: 山谷令人嘆為觀止的風景每年吸引數千名遊客。

example: She jogged along the quiet lane lined with cherry blossom trees.
example_zh: 她沿著兩旁種滿櫻花樹的幽靜小路慢跑。

example: Children carried colorful lanterns through the streets during the festival parade.
example_zh: 孩子們在節慶遊行中提著五彩繽紛的燈籠穿越街道。

example: She worked on her laptop at the café for several productive hours.
example_zh: 她在咖啡館用筆記型電腦工作了幾個小時，效率很高。

example: Between exercise and diet, the latter plays a crucial role in health.
example_zh: 在運動和飲食之間，後者在健康方面扮演著至關重要的角色。

example: Her infectious laughter filled the room and lifted everyone's spirits.
example_zh: 她富有感染力的笑聲充滿了整個房間，振奮了每個人的心情。

example: She dropped off her laundry at the shop before heading to work.
example_zh: 她在去上班之前把衣物送到了洗衣店。

example: The gardener mowed the lawn every weekend to keep it neatly trimmed.
example_zh: 園丁每個週末都修剪草坪，以保持整齊美觀。

example: A thick layer of snow covered the entire village overnight.
example_zh: 一夜之間，厚厚的一層雪覆蓋了整個村莊。

example: Being lazy on weekends occasionally helps people recharge their energy.
example_zh: 偶爾在週末偷懶有助於人們補充精力。

example: Her strong leadership guided the team through a challenging project successfully.
example_zh: 她強大的領導力引領團隊成功完成了一項艱難的專案。

example: The soccer league announced its schedule for the upcoming season yesterday.
example_zh: 足球聯盟昨天公布了即將到來賽季的賽程。

example: The plumber discovered that the pipe would leak during cold weather.
example_zh: 水管工發現這根管子在寒冷天氣時會洩漏。

example: She tends to lean against the wall when she feels tired.
example_zh: 她感到疲倦時，習慣倚靠著牆壁。

example: The athlete managed to leap over the hurdle with remarkable agility.
example_zh: 這位運動員以驚人的敏捷性成功跳過了跨欄。

example: Continuous learning is essential for adapting to a rapidly changing world.
example_zh: 持續學習對於適應瞬息萬變的世界至關重要。

example: She purchased a genuine leather handbag that would last for many years.
example_zh: 她購買了一個真皮手提包，可以使用很多年。

example: The professor delivered an engaging lecture on ancient civilizations to students.
example_zh: 教授向學生們發表了一場關於古代文明的精彩演講。

example: It is perfectly legal to record a conversation in public spaces.
example_zh: 在公共場所錄製對話是完全合法的。

example: Local legend claims that a dragon once lived beneath the mountain.
example_zh: 當地傳說聲稱曾有一條龍居住在山腳之下。

example: She spends her leisure time reading novels and exploring local museums.
example_zh: 她利用閒暇時間閱讀小說並探索當地博物館。

example: The professor measured the length of each sample before recording the results.
example_zh: 教授在記錄結果之前測量了每個樣本的長度。

example: The librarian recommended several outstanding books on ancient civilizations to the students.

example: The ancient statue stood naked in the museum, attracting curious visitors worldwide.
example_zh: 那座古老的雕像裸體地立於博物館中，吸引了來自世界各地的好奇訪客。

example: Two essential skills define a good leader, namely communication and empathy.
example_zh: 兩項核心技能定義了一位優秀的領導者，也就是溝通能力與同理心。

example: The naughty puppy chewed through three pairs of shoes before noon.
example_zh: 那隻頑皮的小狗在中午前啃壞了三雙鞋子。

example: Her grandfather served in the navy for over twenty dedicated years.
example_zh: 她的祖父在海軍中盡忠職守地服役超過二十年。

example: Clean drinking water is a basic necessity that many people take for granted.
example_zh: 乾淨的飲用水是許多人視為理所當然的基本必需品。

example: The charity distributes warm blankets and food to needy families every winter.
example_zh: 該慈善機構每年冬天都會向貧困家庭分發溫暖的毛毯和食物。

example: Constant exposure to negative news can significantly affect a person's mental health.
example_zh: 長期接觸負面新聞可能會對一個人的心理健康造成重大影響。

example: Parents who neglect their children's emotional needs may cause lasting psychological harm.
example_zh: 忽視孩子情感需求的父母可能會對其造成持久的心理傷害。

example: The lively neighborhood near the harbor is popular with both locals and tourists.
example_zh: 港口附近那個熱鬧的鄰近地區深受當地居民和遊客的喜愛。

example: It takes real nerve to stand up and speak in front of thousands.
example_zh: 在數千人面前站起來發言，需要真正的勇氣與膽識。

example: Building a strong professional network is crucial for advancing your career effectively.
example_zh: 建立強大的專業網絡對於有效推進職業生涯至關重要。

example: His teammates gave him the nickname Flash because of his remarkable speed.
example_zh: 他的隊友因他驚人的速度而給他取了「閃電」這個綽號。

example: Losing her passport abroad turned what should have been a vacation into a nightmare.
example_zh: 在國外遺失護照，讓原本應是一趟假期的旅程變成了一場惡夢。

example: It was a noble gesture to donate half of his earnings to charity.
example_zh: 將一半收入捐給慈善機構是一個高貴而令人敬佩的舉動。

example: The politician's speech was filled with nonsense, leaving voters confused and frustrated.
example_zh: 那位政治人物的演講充滿了廢話，讓選民感到困惑與沮喪。

example: It is perfectly normal to feel anxious before a significant job interview.
example_zh: 在重要的工作面試前感到焦慮是完全正常的。

example: The northern regions of the country experience harsh winters with heavy snowfall.
example_zh: 該國北方地區的冬季嚴寒，降雪量相當大。

example: Nowadays, most people rely heavily on smartphones for daily communication and information.
example_zh: 現今，大多數人在日常溝通和獲取資訊上非常依賴智慧型手機。

example: Many countries are debating whether nuclear energy is a viable solution to climate change.
example_zh: 許多國家正在討論核能是否是應對氣候變遷的可行解決方案。

example: The researcher conducted numerous experiments before finally arriving at a reliable conclusion.
example_zh: 研究人員進行了許多實驗，才終於得出可靠的結論。

example: Her durable nylon backpack survived years of rough travel across remote mountain trails.
example_zh: 她耐用的尼龍背包在偏遠山區的多年旅行中依然完好無損。

example: Lack of funding proved to be the greatest obstacle to completing the research project.
example_zh: 資金不足被證明是完成這項研究計畫的最大障礙。

example: Students must obtain written permission from the principal before organizing any school event.
example_zh: 學生在籌辦任何學校活動之前，必須取得校長的書面許可。

example: It was obvious that she had not slept well, given her pale complexion.
example_zh: 從她蒼白的臉色來看，她顯然沒有睡好覺。

example: Graduations are a joyful occasion worth celebrating with close friends and family.
example_zh: 畢業典禮是值得與親朋好友一同慶祝的歡樂場合。

example: She chose teaching as her occupation because she is passionate about inspiring young minds.
example_zh: 她選擇教書作為職業，因為她熱衷於啟發年輕人的心智。

example: The protesters decided to occupy the main square for several days to draw attention.
example_zh: 抗議者決定占據主廣場數天，以引起大眾關注。

example: Earthquakes are likely to occur more frequently in regions situated along tectonic plate boundaries.
example_zh: 地震更可能頻繁發生在位於板塊交界處的地區。

example: It seemed odd that the store was completely deserted on such a busy afternoon.
example_zh: 在如此繁忙的下午，這家商店竟然空無一人，顯得十分奇怪。

example: Spreading false rumors about a colleague can be considered a serious workplace offense.
example_zh: 散布有關同事的不實謠言可被視為嚴重的職場冒犯行為。

example: The official statement from the government clarified the new policy details.
example_zh: 政府的官方聲明釐清了新政策的細節。

example: She decided to omit the irrelevant details to keep her report concise.
example_zh: 她決定省略不相關的細節，以使報告更加簡潔。

example: The magnificent opera performance left the entire audience completely speechless last evening.
example_zh: 那場精彩的歌劇表演讓所有觀眾昨晚都驚嘆不已。

example: The delicate operation required a highly skilled surgeon and advanced medical equipment.
example_zh: 這項精細的手術需要技術高超的外科醫生和先進的醫療設備。

example: Studying abroad gave her a remarkable opportunity to broaden her cultural perspectives.
example_zh: 出國留學給了她一個拓展文化視野的絕佳機會。

example: Several council members strongly oppose the proposed construction of a new highway.
example_zh: 幾位議員強烈反對興建新高速公路的提案。

example: Their approaches to solving the problem were completely opposite, yet both effective.
example_zh: 他們解決問題的方式完全相反，但兩種方法都很有效。

example: Despite numerous setbacks, the young entrepreneur remained optimistic about her business prospects.
example_zh: 儘管遭遇多次挫折，這位年輕企業家對商業前景仍保持樂觀。

example: Choosing public transportation is a practical option for reducing your carbon footprint.
example_zh: 選擇大眾運輸是減少碳足跡的一個實際可行的選擇。

example: Students must pass both the written and oral examinations to earn their certificate.
example_zh: 學生必須通過筆試和口試才能取得證書。

example: The newly launched satellite will orbit the Earth every ninety minutes continuously.
example_zh: 這顆新發射的衛星將每九十分鐘持續繞地球運行一圈。

example: The renowned orchestra performed Beethoven's symphony to a captivated audience last weekend.
example_zh: 這支知名管弦樂團上週末為著迷的觀眾演奏了貝多芬的交響曲。

example: The doctor confirmed that all her vital organs were functioning perfectly after surgery.
example_zh: 醫生確認她所有的重要器官在手術後都運作正常。

example: Many consumers prefer organic vegetables because they contain fewer harmful chemical residues.
example_zh: 許多消費者偏好有機蔬菜，因為它們含有較少的有害化學殘留。

example: The international organization launched a campaign to raise awareness about climate change.
example_zh: 這個國際組織發起了一項提升氣候變遷意識的宣傳活動。

example: She decided to organize the community event with volunteers from different neighborhoods.
example_zh: 她決定與來自不同社區的志工共同籌辦這場社區活動。

example: Scientists are still debating the origin of life on our planet.
example_zh: 科學家們仍在爭論地球上生命起源的問題。

example: Her original approach to solving the problem impressed the entire research team.
example_zh: 她解決問題的原創方式令整個研究團隊印象深刻。

example: You must submit the form today; otherwise, your application will not be considered.
example_zh: 你必須今天提交表格，否則你的申請將不會被受理。

example: You ought to consult a doctor if the symptoms persist for several days.
example_zh: 如果症狀持續數天，你應該去看醫生。

example: The outcome of the negotiation surprised both parties involved in the dispute.
example_zh: 談判的結果令參與這場爭議的雙方都感到意外。

example: The outdoor concert attracted thousands of fans despite the cloudy weather.
example_zh: 儘管天色陰沉，這場戶外音樂會仍吸引了數千名樂迷。

example: Please prepare a brief outline of your proposal before the meeting tomorrow.
example_zh: 請在明天的會議前準備好你提案的簡短大綱。

example: The factory's daily output increased significantly after installing the new machinery.
example_zh: 安裝新機械後，工廠的每日產量大幅提升。

example: Her outstanding performance earned her a scholarship to a prestigious university abroad.
example_zh: 她傑出的表現為她贏得了一所知名海外大學的獎學金。

example: The architect designed an oval conference room to encourage open discussion among participants.
example_zh: 建築師設計了一間橢圓形會議室，以促進與會者之間的開放討論。

example: He worked hard to overcome his fear of public speaking over several months.
example_zh: 他花了數個月努力克服對公開演講的恐懼。

example: Many tourists climb the hilltop to overlook the breathtaking scenery of the valley.
example_zh: 許多遊客登上山頂，俯瞰山谷令人嘆為觀止的美景。

example: She stayed overnight at the library to finish her research paper before the deadline.
example_zh: 她在圖書館通宵達旦，趕在截止日期前完成她的研究報告。

example: The doctor advised him to exercise regularly because he was significantly overweight.
example_zh: 醫生建議他定期運動，因為他的體重已明顯超重。

example: She still owes her colleague a sincere apology for the misunderstanding.
example_zh: 她仍欠同事一個真誠的道歉，因為那場誤會。

example: The barn owl perched silently on a branch, scanning the dark field.
example_zh: 那隻倉鴞靜靜地棲在樹枝上，掃視著黑暗的田野。

example: Climbers at high altitudes often carry portable oxygen tanks to breathe safely.
example_zh: 在高海拔攀登的登山者通常攜帶攜帶式氧氣筒以便安全呼吸。

example: The chef recommended fresh oysters served with a squeeze of lemon juice.
example_zh: 廚師推薦新鮮牡蠣，搭配一擠檸檬汁享用。

example: The instructor adjusted the pace of the course to suit all students.
example_zh: 講師調整了課程的步調，以適合所有學生的程度。

example: A mysterious package arrived at the office with no return address listed.
example_zh: 一個神秘的包裹送達辦公室，上面沒有任何寄件地址。

example: She placed a thick foam pad beneath her yoga mat for comfort.
example_zh: 她在瑜伽墊下放了一塊厚泡棉墊，以增加舒適感。

example: He gripped the paddle firmly as the canoe entered the rapid current.
example_zh: 獨木舟進入急流時，他緊緊握住槳桿。

example: The vibrant painting captured the essence of a bustling morning marketplace.
example_zh: 這幅色彩鮮豔的畫捕捉了熱鬧早市的精髓。

example: Tourists gathered outside the royal palace to witness the changing of the guard.
example_zh: 遊客聚集在皇宮外，觀看衛兵交接儀式。

example: The fortune teller traced the lines across the young woman's open palm.
example_zh: 算命師仔細描繪那位年輕女子張開手掌上的紋路。

example: She topped the fluffy pancake with fresh berries and a drizzle of honey.
example_zh: 她在鬆軟的鬆餅上擺了新鮮莓果，並淋上一些蜂蜜。

example: An expert panel was assembled to evaluate the city's new environmental policies.
example_zh: 一個專家小組被召集起來，評估該市的新環保政策。

example: A sudden power outage triggered widespread panic among passengers in the tunnel.
example_zh: 突然停電在隧道內的乘客之間引發了大規模恐慌。

example: He bought a pair of waterproof pants specifically designed for hiking in rain.
example_zh: 他買了一條專為雨中健行設計的防水褲子。

example: The opening paragraph of her essay immediately captured the reader's attention.
example_zh: 她文章的開頭段落立刻吸引了讀者的注意力。

example: A mysterious parcel arrived at her doorstep early on Monday morning.
example_zh: 一個神秘的包裹在週一清晨出現在她的門口。

example: Every participant in the workshop received a certificate upon successful completion.
example_zh: 工作坊中的每位參與者在順利完成後都獲得了證書。

example: Students are strongly encouraged to participate actively in classroom discussions and debates.
example_zh: 學生們被強烈鼓勵積極參與課堂討論與辯論。

example: She is very particular about the quality of ingredients she uses.
example_zh: 她對所使用的食材品質非常挑剔。

example: The narrow passage between the two buildings was barely wide enough.
example_zh: 兩棟建築之間狹窄的通道幾乎不夠寬。

example: His passion for music inspired him to practice the violin daily.
example_zh: 他對音樂的熱情激勵他每天練習小提琴。

example: A passive attitude at work often leads to missed career opportunities.
example_zh: 在工作上態度被動，往往會錯失職涯發展的機會。

example: She renewed her passport three weeks before her international trip abroad.
example_zh: 她在出國旅行的三週前更新了她的護照。

example: Creating a strong password with symbols and numbers enhances your account security.
example_zh: 建立一個包含符號和數字的強密碼可以增強帳戶安全性。

example: Please copy the link and paste it into the address bar.
example_zh: 請複製連結並將其貼到網址列中。

example: Teaching young children requires an enormous amount of patience and dedication.
example_zh: 教導幼童需要極大的耐心與奉獻精神。

example: The speaker chose to pause briefly before delivering the surprising conclusion.
example_zh: 演講者在說出令人驚訝的結論前選擇短暫暫停。

example: The city council decided to pave the old dirt road downtown.
example_zh: 市議會決定鋪設市區那條舊泥土路。

example: The injured dog held up its paw and whimpered in pain.
example_zh: 受傷的狗抬起牠的爪子，痛苦地嗚咽。

example: The ripe peach from the orchard was incredibly sweet and fragrant.
example_zh: 果園裡成熟的桃子格外香甜，令人垂涎。

example: She crushed roasted peanuts to make a rich, homemade butter spread.
example_zh: 她將烤花生碾碎，製作出濃郁的自製花生醬。

example: The diver discovered a rare pearl hidden deep inside an oyster shell.
example_zh: 潛水員在牡蠣殼深處發現了一顆罕見的珍珠。

example: The elderly peasant worked tirelessly in the fields from dawn until dusk.
example_zh: 這位年邁的農夫從黎明到黃昏不停地在田間辛勤勞作。

example: You should peel the mango carefully before slicing it into neat pieces.
example_zh: 你應該仔細削去芒果的外皮，再將它切成整齊的片段。

example: She sought advice from a trusted peer who had faced similar challenges.
example_zh: 她向一位曾面對過類似挑戰的信任同輩尋求建議。

example: The company faced a hefty penalty for violating environmental protection regulations.
example_zh: 該公司因違反環境保護法規而面臨高額罰款。

example: The Antarctic penguin waddled gracefully across the icy terrain toward the shore.
example_zh: 南極企鵝搖搖擺擺地穿越冰雪地形，優雅地朝岸邊走去。

example: He found a shiny penny on the pavement and slipped it into his pocket.
example_zh: 他在人行道上發現了一枚閃亮的便士，並將它悄悄放進口袋。

example: After thirty years of service, she finally began collecting her monthly pension.
example_zh: 服務了三十年後，她終於開始領取每月的退休金。

example: Sales increased by nearly fifteen percent following the successful marketing campaign.
example_zh: 在成功的行銷活動之後，銷售額增長了近百分之十五。

example: A significant percentage of students chose to study abroad for their degrees.
example_zh: 相當大比例的學生選擇出國深造，攻讀學位。

example: The talented musician will perform a breathtaking solo at tonight's grand concert.
example_zh: 這位才華洋溢的音樂家將在今晚的盛大音樂會上演奏令人屏息的獨奏。

example: Her outstanding performance in the drama competition earned her a standing ovation.
example_zh: 她在戲劇比賽中出色的表演贏得了全場觀眾起立鼓掌。

example: The street performer astonished the crowd with his remarkable juggling and acrobatics.
example_zh: 這位街頭表演者以精彩的雜耍和特技表演令圍觀人群大為驚嘆。

example: The delicate perfume of jasmine drifted through the entire garden at dusk.
example_zh: 茉莉花淡雅的香水氣息在黃昏時飄散於整座花園中。

example: The scientist warned that the damage to the coral reef could be permanent.
example_zh: 科學家警告，珊瑚礁所受到的破壞可能是永久性的。

example: Students must obtain written permission before leaving the school premises early.
example_zh: 學生在提早離開學校校園之前，必須取得書面許可。

example: Local authorities refused to permit the construction of a new factory nearby.
example_zh: 地方當局拒絕允許在附近興建一座新工廠。

example: Despite repeated failures, she chose to persist in pursuing her academic goals.
example_zh: 儘管屢次失敗，她仍選擇堅持追求自己的學術目標。

example: His warm and outgoing personality made him popular among colleagues at work.
example_zh: 他溫暖開朗的個性使他在職場同事中深受歡迎。

example: It took considerable effort to persuade the committee to approve the new budget.
example_zh: 說服委員會批准新預算花費了相當大的努力。

example: She grew pessimistic about the economy after reading several discouraging financial reports.
example_zh: 她在閱讀幾份令人沮喪的財務報告後，對經濟感到悲觀。

example: The sudden migration of monarch butterflies remains a fascinating natural phenomenon.
example_zh: 帝王蝶的突然遷徙至今仍是一個令人著迷的自然現象。

example: The ancient philosopher argued that virtue and wisdom are inseparable from happiness.
example_zh: 這位古代哲學家主張美德與智慧和幸福密不可分。

example: Her personal philosophy emphasized the importance of kindness and empathy toward others.
example_zh: 她的個人哲學強調善良與對他人的同理心之重要性。

example: The phrase 'break a leg' is commonly used to wish performers good luck.
example_zh: 「break a leg」這個片語常被用來祝演出者好運。

example: Regular physical exercise has been proven to reduce stress and improve mental health.
example_zh: 規律的身體鍛鍊已被證實能減輕壓力並改善心理健康。

example: The physician advised her to reduce salt intake and get adequate rest.
example_zh: 醫師建議她減少鹽分攝取並獲得充足的休息。

example: Advanced physics concepts such as quantum mechanics can be difficult to grasp initially.
example_zh: 量子力學等進階物理學概念在一開始可能難以理解。

example: She added a crunchy pickle to her sandwich for extra flavor.
example_zh: 她在三明治裡加了一片脆醃黃瓜來增添風味。

example: The pigeon perched on the ledge and watched the busy street below.
example_zh: 那隻鴿子停在窗台上，俯瞰著下方熱鬧的街道。

example: Marie Curie was a pioneer in the field of radioactive research.
example_zh: 瑪麗·居里是放射性研究領域的先驅。

example: The notorious pirate commanded a crew of fifty fearless sailors.
example_zh: 那位惡名昭彰的海盜率領著五十名無畏的水手。

example: It was a great pity that the concert was cancelled due to rain.
example_zh: 音樂會因雨取消，實在令人遺憾。

example: The excessive use of plastic has caused severe damage to ocean ecosystems.
example_zh: 過度使用塑膠已對海洋生態系統造成嚴重傷害。

example: The playful kitten chased a ball of yarn across the entire floor.
example_zh: 那隻愛玩的小貓在整個地板上追著一團毛線球跑。

example: There is plenty of fresh produce available at the local farmers' market.
example_zh: 當地的農夫市集有大量新鮮農產品可供選購。

example: The unexpected twist in the plot left readers completely astonished and speechless.
example_zh: 情節中出乎意料的轉折讓讀者們目瞪口呆，無言以對。

example: He inserted the plug into the socket and turned on the lamp.
example_zh: 他將插頭插入插座，然後打開了檯燈。

example: The baker used fresh plum to make a delicious jam for breakfast.
example_zh: 那位烘焙師用新鮮梅子製作了一款美味的果醬作為早餐配料。

example: The plumber repaired the leaking pipe before it could damage the floor.
example_zh: 水管工在漏水的管道損壞地板之前就將其修好了。

example: The celebrated poet recited her verses to an enthusiastic audience in Paris.
example_zh: 那位著名詩人在巴黎向熱情的觀眾朗誦了她的詩作。

example: Reading poetry aloud helped her appreciate the rhythm and beauty of language.
example_zh: 大聲朗讀詩歌幫助她欣賞語言的韻律與美感。

example: The detective discovered that the victim had been exposed to a rare poison.
example_zh: 偵探發現受害者曾接觸過一種罕見的毒物。

example: The hiker was warned to avoid the poisonous berries growing along the trail.
